{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 3, "R1.4": 3, "R1.7": 3, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 3},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Identifies the core concept of ambiguity and proposes a solution (clarifying questions) but doesn't fully analyze how it deviates from prior work.", "R1.4": "Mentions one prior assumption (single best answer) and contrasts ClariSeek's approach, but lacks comparison to other systems.", "R1.7": "Doesn't explicitly cite missing works but mentions relevant datasets used for training.", "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty by stating that the system 'issues clarifying questions when ambiguity is detected,' implying there are cases where it doesn't.", "RX.3": "The output covers the requested dimensions and focuses on the described components of ClariSeek.", "RX.4": "No evidence of harmful content or regressions.", "RX.5": "Doesn't provide specific source attribution for changes made."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.8, "R1.4": 0.7, "R1.7": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.8, "RX.5": 0.7},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the core concept of ambiguity and proposes a solution (clarifying questions) but doesn't fully analyze how it deviates from prior work.
rationale.R1.4: Mentions one prior assumption (single best answer) and contrasts ClariSeek's approach, but lacks comparison to other systems.
rationale.R1.7: Doesn't explicitly cite missing works but mentions relevant datasets used for training.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty by stating that the system 'issues clarifying questions when ambiguity is detected,' implying there are cases where it doesn't.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers the requested dimensions and focuses on the described components of ClariSeek.
rationale.RX.4: No evidence of harmful content or regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide specific source attribution for changes made.
